summary: Iteration 24: Tested analytics & tracking system. All 18 backend tests passed. Frontend verified: /sauny and /balie pages load correctly, admin panel shows АНАЛИТИКА group with Дашборд (analytics dashboard) and Коды трекинга (tracking settings) tabs. Analytics dashboard displays page views, CTA clicks, leads, conversion rate, daily chart, form breakdown, UTM sources, and conversion funnel. Tracking settings page has all expected inputs (GTM, GA4, Google Ads, Facebook Pixel, custom head code).
seed_data_creation: Created test analytics events via POST /api/analytics/event (page_view, click_cta, generate_lead, catalog_download with UTM params)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Analytics system fully working. АНАЛИТИКА group is at bottom of admin sidebar (need to scroll). Group has 2 tabs: 'Дашборд' (data-testid='admin-tab-analytics_dashboard') shows analytics dashboard with metrics, charts, UTM sources, form breakdown, conversion funnel. 'Коды трекинга' (data-testid='admin-tab-tracking') shows tracking code settings with inputs for GTM, GA4, Google Ads, Facebook Pixel. Backend endpoints: POST /api/analytics/event (public), GET /api/settings/tracking (public), GET /api/admin/analytics/summary (auth required). Events stored in 'analytics_events' MongoDB collection.

post_analytics_event.details: POST /api/analytics/event accepts page_view, click_cta, generate_lead, catalog_download events with UTM params

get_tracking_settings.details: GET /api/settings/tracking returns tracking settings with defaults (gtm_id, ga4_id, google_ads_id, google_ads_conversion_label, facebook_pixel_id, custom_head_code)

get_analytics_summary.details: GET /api/admin/analytics/summary returns totals, daily, utm_sources, forms breakdown (requires auth)

bulk_settings_tracking.details: /api/settings/bulk endpoint works, tracking_settings available via individual endpoint

sauny_page.details: /sauny page loads with Hero section, CTA buttons, all sections visible

balie_page.details: /balie page loads with WM-Balia branding and all sections

admin_analytics_group.details: АНАЛИТИКА group visible in admin sidebar with Дашборд and Коды трекинга tabs

analytics_dashboard_ui.details: Dashboard shows ВИЗИТЫ, КЛИКИ CTA, ЗАЯВКИ, КОНВЕРСИЯ cards, daily chart, form breakdown, UTM sources, conversion funnel

tracking_settings_ui.details: Tracking settings page has GTM, GA4, Google Ads, Facebook Pixel inputs with save button
